Summarize a QTE object

Source: R/04-S3-Methods.R
summary.dpmixgpd_qte.Rd

Returns a structured summary of QTE results for further analysis or display. Includes overall statistics, per-quantile summaries, and metadata.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'dpmixgpd_qte'
summary(object, ...)

Arguments

object

A "dpmixgpd_qte" object from qte().

...

Unused.

Value

An object of class "summary.dpmixgpd_qte" containing summary statistics.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
cb <- build_causal_bundle(y = y, X = X, T = T, backend = "sb", kernel = "normal", components = 6)
fit <- run_mcmc_causal(cb, show_progress = FALSE)
q <- qte(fit, probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75), interval = "credible")
summary(q)
} # }
